headline: Wells Fargo Cuts Clorox (CLX) Price Target, Sees Inflation Pressuring Margins
summary: The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 8, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) to $110 from $125. It kept an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm is trimming estimates across the sector ahead of earnings. It based those […]
